description.en_US: Integrate Google Calendar into Atomemo workflows
description.zh_Hans: 将 Google 日历集成到 Atomemo 工作流中

description.en_US: OAuth2 for Google Calendar API. Enter Client ID and Client Secret from Google Cloud Console, then authorize via the OAuth flow to connect your calendar.
description.zh_Hans: Google Calendar API 的 OAuth2 凭证。在 Google Cloud Console 填入 Client ID 和 Client Secret，然后通过 OAuth 授权流程连接你的日历。

hint.en_US: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console
hint.zh_Hans: 来自 Google Cloud Console 的 OAuth 2.0 客户端 ID

hint.en_US: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console
hint.zh_Hans: 来自 Google Cloud Console 的 OAuth 2.0 客户端密钥
